meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve tutorial hell (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome tutorial hell. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Template to Escape Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Stop building tutorials and start shipping SaaS. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to accelerate your MVP development from idea to revenue.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell is a revenue-killer. You escape it by transitioning from passive consumption to an opinionated, modular architecture. The Antigravity project template enforces SaaS best practices, allowing you to leverage Claude Code for rapid feature iteration, ensuring every line of code serves your core business logic and market validation.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks watching YouTube tutorials, stitching together fragmented codebases that never quite feel like a product. It is a siren song that keeps you busy but ensures you stay broke. You are building in a vacuum, optimizing for syntax rather than sales.

It is time to pivot from 'student' to 'founder'. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you stop reinventing the authentication, database, and billing boilerplate. You gain an industrial-grade foundation that allows you to focus solely on the high-value features your customers will actually pay for.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a production-ready baseline that includes pre-configured database schema and secure auth flows.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Antigravity base template with Stripe integration and Supabase auth.

steps.title: Define Core Business Logic
steps.description: Translate your unique value proposition into modular services that fit the template structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for a subscription-based AI content generator, ensuring separation of concerns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate service layer for content module'

steps.title: Implement High-Velocity UI
steps.description: Use the template's component library to build your landing page and dashboard without custom CSS fatigue.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard component using existing Antigravity design tokens for a SaaS metrics view.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'build dashboard view with existing design tokens'

steps.title: Automate Database Migrations
steps.description: Ensure your schema evolves safely as you add new features to your MVP.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a migration script for the new 'UserPreferences' table following Antigravity standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate migration for user preferences'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Finalize your build pipeline and push to a live environment to start gathering real-world feedback.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the production deployment pipeline for Vercel with environment variable validation.

pro_tips: Treat your codebase as an asset to be sold, not a playground for learning new frameworks.
Always build for the 'happy path' first; edge cases are for when you have paying customers.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your revenue-generating functions immediately.
Never modify the core Antigravity template structure; extend it via plugins to keep updates seamless.
Measure your success by 'Time to First Dollar', not 'Lines of Code Written'.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus exclusively on distribution. Use the time you saved by not writing boilerplate to contact your first 100 potential customers for feedback.
content.conversion_block: You have the blueprint and the tools. The only thing missing is your execution. Stop stalling and start building a product that solves real problems. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
